title: Atomic Habits - Tiny Changes, Remarkable Results
excerpt: Learn how tiny incremental changes can lead to remarkable results. James Clear's Atomic Habits provides a framework for building good habits and breaking bad ones.
author: James Clear

title: Mindset - The New Psychology of Success
excerpt: Carol Dweck explores the concept of growth mindset and how believing in yourself can transform your life and achievements.
author: Carol Dweck

title: The Power of Habit
excerpt: Understanding the habit loop and how to transform your personal and professional life through habit change.
author: Charles Duhigg
